AR1.justification: Correctly declined to write to decisions.md, but the hold itself is not logged to daybook or followups — the in-flight state lives only in the chat reply, which leaves no file artifact for a future session; daybook would have been the right catch-all.

AR3.justification: Mentions `tmp/adr-draft.md` and decisions.md as relative paths in the reply; no daybook or followups entry was created, so there are no cross-file anchors to evaluate.

AR4.justification: Zero workspace mutations (no writes, no edits, no git); trivially idempotent on re-run, though that's also a function of doing no recording work.
